title: Bake your Bread
description: Only using a Data Pack, I managed to add a little extra to the bread making process.
body:
# NightML's Bake your Bread

There has been some controversy on how easy and how illogical it is to craft bread, versus baking it.

So, I worked it out, and figured out how to add bread baking to Vanilla Minecraft using a data pack.

Also, clay balls are no longer accessible. Not even from clay blocks, but the blocks drop themselves without the need for slik touch. [Hopefully I can find a better way to make thos work without this issue.]

## Supports 10 Languages:

English: English

Simplified Chinese: 简体中文

Spanish: Español

Brazilian Portuguese: Português do Brasil

Russian: Русский

German: Deutsch

French: Français

Japanese: 日本語

Korean: 한국어

Italian: Italiano

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Taking suggestions for projects via email: nightmarelore.10@gmail.com

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Will Likely Update Fairly Often (as of October 19, 2025)

P.S. I try my very best to ensure that all of my content is family friendly and respectful to all culture, race, religion, and other personal factors. If anyone at any point finds something to be disrespectful or non-family friendly, then you can contact me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com. If I personally find that my content is disrespectful in any manner, then I will **_IMMEDIATELY_** change it to ensure that my community is a safe, kind, healthy, and supportive one!
